description: Delete dead CSS blocks for insanity, corruption-v2, and equipment-cards panels

blocks_deleted.reason: Entire block nested inside .wh40k-insanity-panel-v2 — class never used in any template. The insanity UI has been fully replaced by degree-meter-panel.hbs + vital-panel-shell.hbs using Tailwind utilities.
blocks_deleted.notes: insanity-panel.hbs is a thin caller to degree-meter-panel.hbs which uses Tailwind. No template changes needed.

blocks_deleted.reason: Entire block nested inside .wh40k-corruption-panel-v2 — class never used in any template. The corruption UI has been fully replaced by degree-meter-panel.hbs + vital-panel-shell.hbs using Tailwind utilities.
blocks_deleted.notes: corruption-panel.hbs is a thin caller to degree-meter-panel.hbs which uses Tailwind. Note: wh40k-degree-* styling is preserved in the _overview-dashboard.css block (wh40k-mental-degree), which is separate and NOT deleted. The degree class names emitted by corruptionDegreeClass/insanityDegreeClass helpers continue to work for the vital-panel-shell rootStateClass but have no CSS rules applied from the deleted block (the v2 panel was the consumer; the new shell uses Tailwind directly).

blocks_deleted.reason: All equipment-card/equip-row/card-* classes in this block are unused — no template references found for wh40k-equipment-table, wh40k-equip-row, wh40k-equipment-card, wh40k-card-header, wh40k-stat-badge, etc.
blocks_deleted.notes: wh40k-action-btn IS used in talent-sheet.hbs and item-armour-sheet.hbs, but its CSS rules come from _talent-sheet.css (line 9464) and _armour.css (line 6367) — NOT from this deleted block. The deletion does not affect those usages. wh40k-dropzone/wh40k-modifier-value classes are also used but their CSS rules come from _unified-components.css and _talent-sheet.css blocks respectively — also not affected.

ratchet_results.css:ratchet: PASS — tw-only=129 mixed=115 css-only=0 (unchanged; deleted blocks were dead CSS not consumed by templates)
ratchet_results.animation:ratchet: PASS — no animation rules were in the deleted blocks
